methodology: Album-context POS and morphology tagging cross-checked against open-source Spanish conjugation tables; selected colloquial and ambiguous forms manually reviewed.

vamo.form: nosotros/as · present or command · colloquial vamos

vo'a.form: yo · present indicative · colloquial voy a

baile.note: Here it is a noun. As a verb, baile can also be present subjunctive or a formal command of bailar.

vírate.form: tú · affirmative command · Puerto Rican usage

voa.form: yo · present indicative · colloquial voy a
